topic: My smart lock app shows someone entering my house every night while I sleep
title: My Smart Lock Shows Someone Entering My House Every Night at Two AM | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The log said my front door opened at two fifty one AM. It said I opened it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a smart lock activity log, a single entry highlighted showing an unlock event at two fifty one AM labeled with the homeowner's name, the phone held in dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. I checked with a doctor years ago. I do not sleepwalk.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a quiet one-bedroom apartment interior at night, a single lamp on in the corner, the front door visible and closed at the far end of the room, no one visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I installed the lock after a break-in two doors down.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smart lock keypad mounted on a front door interior, the deadbolt engaged, entry hallway dark behind, a single overhead light above the door, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First entry: a Tuesday. Two forty eight AM. My name in the log.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a tablet screen showing a smart home app activity list, one row highlighted near the top of the log showing an early morning door event attributed to the account owner, dim room behind, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a dark bedroom, rumpled bedsheets visible, a digital clock on the nightstand reading three AM, the bedroom door open to a dark hallway beyond, no movement, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Door closed. Deadbolt locked. Chain on.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a front door interior at night, the deadbolt thrown, a brass chain latch engaged across the door gap, dim hallway light barely visible beneath a closed door at the far end, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a phone to an ear in a dim apartment interior, the smart lock app still visible on the coffee table screen behind, evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Only my credentials had ever touched that lock. No exceptions in the system.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a smart lock admin panel with an access history table, a single user account listed with all entries attributed to it, no other credentials registered, desk lamp on at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set an alarm for two thirty AM and sat facing the door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim apartment entry hallway at night, a figure seated in a chair facing the front door from several feet away, the smart lock keypad faintly glowing green on the door, no other light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At two fifty one the lock clicked. The door did not move. The chain did not shift. My phone lit up with the entry notification.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smart lock on a closed front door, the lock indicator LED glowing green in the dark hallway, the deadbolt still in the locked position, the chain still engaged, nothing disturbed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I changed the credentials that morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of hands typing at a laptop, a smart lock settings page open showing the credentials field being updated, bright daylight from a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the new credentials appeared in the log at two fifty one AM. I was sitting three feet from the door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen in a completely dark room showing a smart lock push notification, the timestamp reading two fifty one AM, the entry attributed to the updated account name, the phone screen the only source of light in the frame, vertical 9:16 framing
